methods.description: Method for determining the pH of sediment samples using a pH meter after preparing a sediment-water suspension. Ultrapure water was used to avoid contamination.

steps.description: Sediment pH was determined by pH meter (Orion Star A211, Thermo Scientific, Indonesia) in ultrapure water using mass ratios of 1:2.5 (sediment to water)
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare sediment-water suspension for pH measurement

steps.description: Sediment pH was determined by pH meter (Orion Star A211, Thermo Scientific, Indonesia) in ultrapure water using mass ratios of 1:2.5 (sediment to water)
steps.searchable_summary: Measure pH of sediment-water suspension using a pH meter

methods.description: Method for measuring the electrical conductivity (EC) of sediment samples using a portable multiparameter device after preparing a sediment-water suspension. Ultrapure water was used to avoid contamination.

steps.description: EC was measured in ultrapure water using mass ratios of 1:5 (sediment to water) by portable multiparameter device (Orion Star A329, Thermo Scientific, Indonesia)
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare sediment-water suspension for EC measurement

steps.description: EC was measured in ultrapure water using mass ratios of 1:5 (sediment to water) by portable multiparameter device (Orion Star A329, Thermo Scientific, Indonesia)
steps.searchable_summary: Measure EC of sediment-water suspension using a multiparameter device

methods.description: Method for measuring the total organic carbon (TOC) content in sediment samples using a TOC analyzer.

steps.description: the TOC was measured with a TOC analyzer (Vario TOC Cube, Elementar, Germany)
steps.searchable_summary: Measure TOC content in sediment using a TOC analyzer

methods.description: Method for determining the grain size distribution of sediment samples using a laser size analyzer.

steps.description: grain size of sediment was determined by a laser size analyzer (MalvernMastersizer 2000, Malvern Panalytical Ltd., UK)
steps.searchable_summary: Determine sediment grain size distribution using a laser size analyzer

methods.description: Method for measuring the clay mineral composition of sediment samples using X-ray diffraction (XRD).

steps.description: and clay minerals were measured by X-ray diffraction device (XRD)(D2 PHASER, Bruker AXS, Germany).
steps.searchable_summary: Measure clay mineral composition in sediment using X-ray diffraction (XRD)
outputs: Sediment clay mineral data (e.g., diffractogram, composition)

methods.description: Method for measuring the cation exchange capacity (CEC) of sediment samples using a standard method (NY/T 295-1995). Standard working solutions were used.

steps.description: CEC was measured by standard method (NY/T 295-1995).
steps.searchable_summary: Measure sediment cation exchange capacity (CEC) using standard method NY/T 295-1995
